response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. The audio phonetically matches the talk segment and the song 'WAO!!' by DECO*27. 2. The Reference JSON contains lyrics for 'WAO!!', but the video includes a long talk segment and a specific performance version that includes lyrics not in the JSON snippet. 3. I am prioritizing the audio and on-screen text for the song. 4. Discarded unused JSON lyrics and confirmed timestamps tightly wrap the vocalizations.

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 待って、なんか変な動きしてへん？もしかして
subtitles.english: Wait, are you doing a weird movement? Maybe?

subtitles.original: みんな面白いから、これやって！
subtitles.english: Everyone, it's funny, so do this!

subtitles.original: 両方にいるからね！両方見たいんだけど！
subtitles.english: I'm on both sides! I want to see both though!

subtitles.original: ありがとう、ありがとう！莉々華は、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you! Ririka... thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 早速ですねライブスタートしたわけなんですが
subtitles.english: The live show has started right away...

subtitles.original: 今回の配信のハッシュタグ！右上のこちら！
subtitles.english: The hashtag for this stream! This one on the top right!

subtitles.original: こちら！こちら！ハッシュタグ #一条莉々華生誕祭2025 となってます！
subtitles.english: This one! This one! The hashtag is #IchijouRirikaBirthday2025!

subtitles.original: Xでたくさんたくさんポストしてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you post a lot on X!

subtitles.original: スクショとか感想とか、モリモリ待ってます！
subtitles.english: I'm waiting for lots of screenshots and thoughts!

subtitles.original: かなた先輩と「特者生存ワンダラダー」歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I sang "Tokusha Seizou Wonderer" with Kanata-senpai!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: でもこの曲本当に可愛くて、もう踊りもめっちゃ可愛いし！
subtitles.english: But this song is really cute, and the dance is so cute too!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！ありがとう！めちゃくちゃ歌えて踊れて嬉しかったです！
subtitles.english: I'm happy! Thank you! I was so happy to sing and dance!

subtitles.original: 私こそ莉々華の声でね、聴けて踊ってもらえて本当に幸せでした！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Me too, hearing Ririka's voice and dancing with her, I was so happy!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！やったー！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Yay!

subtitles.original: そして、このあとね、こよりちゃん先輩はあの曲を…
subtitles.english: And after this, Koyori-chan senpai will sing THAT song...!

subtitles.original: 歌わせていただきます！
subtitles.english: I'll be singing it!

subtitles.original: どの曲なんだろう！あれかな！あれかな！
subtitles.english: I wonder which song it is! Is it that one? Or that one?

subtitles.original: もう莉々華の大好きな曲で本当に…！
subtitles.english: It's a song Ririka loves so much, really...!

subtitles.original: あれ？なんかちょっとおかしいぞ？
subtitles.english: Wait? Something is a bit strange?

subtitles.original: なんだこれ！赤いよ！
subtitles.english: What is this! It's red!

subtitles.original: へ？へ？大丈夫か？なんか出てくるぞ！
subtitles.english: Huh? Huh? Is it okay? Something is coming out!

subtitles.original: なんだ！なんだ！ちょっとどうなってんだよ莉々華！
subtitles.english: What! What! Hey, what's going on, Ririka?!

subtitles.original: わからない！本当に！
subtitles.english: I don't know! Really!

subtitles.original: でも待ってください！あそこにゾンビ撃退クリームがある！
subtitles.english: But wait! There's zombie repellent cream over there!

subtitles.original: なんやそれ！取りに行きましょう！
subtitles.english: What's that! Let's go get it!

subtitles.original: ソフトクリームだよね…
subtitles.english: It's probably soft-serve ice cream...

subtitles.original: 違います！これは幻のクリームですよ！
subtitles.english: No! This is the legendary cream!

subtitles.original: 説明役どこ貸してんだよ！
subtitles.english: Where are you getting this narrator role from?!

subtitles.original: これをゾンビに当てれば、多分ゾンビを…
subtitles.english: If we hit the zombies with this, we should be able to...

subtitles.original: 殲滅できるはず！
subtitles.english: annihilate the zombies!

subtitles.original: 多分？！できなかったら死んで！
subtitles.english: Probably?! If we can't, we're dead!

subtitles.original: やばいやばい！行け行け！莉々華、見ろよ！
subtitles.english: Oh no! Go go! Ririka, watch!

subtitles.original: 見てろ、やり方を！
subtitles.english: Watch how it's done!

subtitles.original: 物理なんだ…
subtitles.english: It's physical...

subtitles.original: やったぜー！なんとかなりました！
subtitles.english: We did it! We managed somehow!

subtitles.original: 危ない危ない！なんか一瞬かっこつけてたけどな！
subtitles.english: Dangerous! Though you looked cool for a second!

subtitles.original: 変だよ！乗っ取りは完了ということ！
subtitles.english: That's weird! The takeover is complete!

subtitles.original: 乗っ取られてんの？ゾンビに…大丈夫？離せよ！
subtitles.english: Are you being taken over? By the zombies? Are you okay? Speak up!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫です！離せよ！乗っ取ったんだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm okay! Speak up! I took over!

subtitles.original: あ、戻った！帰ってきてくれた！よかったー！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's back! You came back! Thank God!

subtitles.original: なんなんだこの…全くわからなかったぞ！一体何だったんだよ莉々華！
subtitles.english: What was this... I didn't get it at all! What on earth was that, Ririka?!

subtitles.original: 実はですね…ちょっとお化け屋敷感みたいなのを
subtitles.english: Actually... I wanted you to experience a bit of a haunted house vibe,

subtitles.original: せっかく遊園地だから味わってほしいなって思って！
subtitles.english: since we're at an amusement park!

subtitles.original: えー？！待って！ジェットコースターがよかった！作謀だよ！
subtitles.english: Wha?! Wait! I wanted the roller coaster! It's a plot!

subtitles.original: スモークは焚いてほしいって言ったんですけど…
subtitles.english: I did ask them to use smoke...

subtitles.original: ちょっとまさかゾンビまで出てくるとは思わなくて！
subtitles.english: I just didn't expect zombies to show up too!

subtitles.original: 怖すぎるだろ！あんたの説明口調のやつおかしかったぞ！
subtitles.english: That's too scary! Your explanation was weird!

subtitles.original: 接待でしょだけだったよね！接待でしょだけだったよね！
subtitles.english: It was just 'hospitality', wasn't it?! It was just 'hospitality'!

subtitles.original: やばい！バレる！ま…ソフトクリームだ！
subtitles.english: Oh no! I'm caught! I mean... soft-serve ice cream!

subtitles.original: このあとはこよりちゃん先輩と歌わせて…
subtitles.english: After this, I'll sing with Koyori-chan senpai...

subtitles.original: この状態で？！どの心境でやればいいんだよ！
subtitles.english: In this state?! What kind of mindset should I have for this!

subtitles.original: 晴れましたすみませんね！
subtitles.english: It's cleared up, sorry about that!

subtitles.original: かなた先輩、このあともちょっとここの遊園地で
subtitles.english: Kanata-senpai, please relax at this amusement park

subtitles.original: まったりゆっくりしててくださいな！
subtitles.english: and take it easy for a bit!

subtitles.original: ベンチで楽しんでて！
subtitles.english: Enjoy yourself on the bench!

subtitles.original: 莉々華たちは行ってきます！二人で歌うぞ！
subtitles.english: We're off! We're gonna sing together!

subtitles.original: 嘘でしょ？！ま…ま…ま…
subtitles.english: You're kidding?! Ma... ma... ma...

subtitles.original: え、ひとりぼっち？僕ひとりにさせられてんだけど！
subtitles.english: Eh, all alone? I'm being left all by myself!

subtitles.original: もうきみの心 チクっとしちゃえ
subtitles.english: Let's prick your heart a little bit.

subtitles.original: わおーん！
subtitles.english: Waooon!

subtitles.original: こより先輩、来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Koyori-senpai, thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！わお！わお！
subtitles.english: My pleasure! Wao! Wao!

subtitles.original: 「絶対無理」思っちゃうし だって だって 不安になるし
subtitles.english: "It's absolutely impossible," I think, because I get anxious.

subtitles.original: 全然嘘つけないし
subtitles.english: I can't tell lies at all.

subtitles.original: 「絶対無理」思っちゃうし だって だって わかまっすぐでし
subtitles.english: "It's absolutely impossible," I think, because I'm so straightforward!

subtitles.original: 目指すキラキラの きっと僕次第だ
subtitles.english: The sparkling future I aim for surely depends on me.

subtitles.original: ビターギブアップなんて 言わないんだから
subtitles.english: Because I'm not going to say "bitter give up"!

subtitles.original: じっとしてらんないし だって だって 動いちゃう足
subtitles.english: I can't stay still, because my legs just keep on moving!

subtitles.original: ワンワンステップちゃん ちょっとずつ進めば 夢の色溶けちゃうな
subtitles.english: Woof woof, step by step, if I move forward, the colors of my dream will blend!

subtitles.original: なりたい僕を 君が好きな僕を ちゃんと余りなく見せたいな
subtitles.english: I want to show you the me I want to be, the me you like, without leaving anything out!

subtitles.original: あっちゃちゃ びっくりするほどできないじゃん
subtitles.english: Ah-cha-cha, I'm surprisingly bad at this, aren't I?

subtitles.original: 間違って悩んだりばかりじゃん
subtitles.english: I'm always making mistakes and worrying.

subtitles.original: けど君に…
subtitles.english: But if I...
